title: Subresource Integrity (SRI) & SBOMs
description: Implement Subresource Integrity (SRI) to cryptographically verify third-party assets from CDNs. Utilize Software Bill of Materials (SBOMs) to audit npm dependencies against supply-chain attacks.
objectives: Implement Subresource Integrity (SRI) to cryptographically verify third-party assets from CDNs.
Utilize Software Bill of Materials (SBOMs) to audit npm dependencies against supply-chain attacks.
